seo.siteTitle: Assoc. Prof. Dr. Erkan Elçi | Obstetrics and Gynecology Specialist
seo.siteDescription: Assoc. Prof. Dr. Erkan Elçi - Obstetrics and Gynecology Specialist. Robotic surgery, gynecological oncology, fibroid treatment, endometriosis and high-risk pregnancy. Istanbul.
seo.miyomTitle: Fibroid Treatment | Assoc. Prof. Dr. Erkan Elçi
seo.miyomDescription: Modern approaches in fibroid treatment. Scarless fibroid surgery, laparoscopic and robotic surgery. Expert doctor in Istanbul.
seo.endometriozisTitle: Endometriosis Treatment | Assoc. Prof. Dr. Erkan Elçi
seo.endometriozisDescription: Advanced laparoscopic surgery in endometriosis and chocolate cyst treatment. Symptoms, diagnosis and treatment methods.
seo.jinekolojikOnkolojiTitle: Gynecological Oncology | Assoc. Prof. Dr. Erkan Elçi
seo.jinekolojikOnkolojiDescription: Diagnosis and treatment of gynecological cancers. Uterine, ovarian, cervical cancer. Treatment with robotic surgery.
seo.genitalEstetikTitle: Genital Aesthetics | Assoc. Prof. Dr. Erkan Elçi
seo.genitalEstetikDescription: Female genital aesthetic surgeries. Labiaplasty, vaginoplasty, clitoral aesthetics and more.
seo.hpvKolposkopiTitle: HPV and Colposcopy | Assoc. Prof. Dr. Erkan Elçi
seo.hpvKolposkopiDescription: HPV diagnosis and treatment, colposcopy, LEEP, conization. HPV vaccination and genital wart treatment.
seo.videolarTitle: Videos | Assoc. Prof. Dr. Erkan Elçi
seo.videolarDescription: Educational videos by Assoc. Prof. Dr. Erkan Elçi. HPV, pregnancy, fibroids, laparoscopic surgery and more.
seo.iletisimTitle: Contact | Assoc. Prof. Dr. Erkan Elçi
seo.iletisimDescription: Contact Assoc. Prof. Dr. Erkan Elçi. For appointments and information requests.
seo.hakkimdaTitle: About | Assoc. Prof. Dr. Erkan Elçi
seo.hakkimdaDescription: Assoc. Prof. Dr. Erkan Elçi - Obstetrics and Gynecology Specialist. 23 years of experience, 50+ scientific publications.
